# Jose Carlos Gomez R. — Portfolio (Full Documentation for AI Models)

> This is the llms-full.txt file. It concatenates the key documentation for AI models to consume in a single pass.

## Project Overview

Jose Carlos Gomez R. is a Full-Stack software engineer specializing in React, Next.js, Python, PostgreSQL, and Supabase. This is his bilingual (Spanish/English) portfolio website.

The site is a single-page static site built with Astro, deployed on Cloudflare Workers Assets, with a Cloudflare Worker that protects three routes (contact email, CV download, CV PDF) using Cloudflare Turnstile anti-bot verification and HMAC-SHA256 signed cookies.

The design follows an Apple-inspired minimal aesthetic: a single Action Blue (#0066cc) accent, Inter typography with negative letter-spacing, alternating light/dark canvas sections, and GSAP-powered micro-interactions (reveal-on-scroll, magnetic buttons, 3D tilt on project cards) — all gated behind prefers-reduced-motion.

## Tech Stack

- Astro 6.3.3 (output: static, MIT license)
- Tailwind CSS 4.3.0 (via Vite plugin, MIT license)
- GSAP 3.15.0 (ES module, GSAP Standard License — free for commercial use, no Club plugins)
- Wrangler 4.100.0 (Cloudflare deploy CLI, MIT license)
- Cloudflare Turnstile (anti-bot, Cloudflare ToS)
- Node.js >= 22.12.0

## Architecture

The portfolio is static-first. Astro generates HTML/CSS/JS at build time into dist/. No framework runtime JS is shipped — the only JS is GSAP (ES module) and the page's UI logic script.

A Cloudflare Worker (src/worker.ts) runs before static assets (run_worker_first: true) and intercepts three protected routes:
- /__contact-email — renders the contact email page after Turnstile verification
- /__download-cv — serves the CV PDF after verification
- /docs/cv-jose-carlos-gomez.pdf — the raw PDF, also protected

All other routes (HTML, CSS, JS, images, fonts) are served publicly via env.ASSETS.fetch(request).

Turnstile flow: protected route → no valid cookie → 403 with Turnstile widget → user completes challenge → POST to /__turnstile-verify → Worker validates token against challenges.cloudflare.com → sets HttpOnly/Secure/SameSite=Lax HMAC-signed cookie for 30 days → redirect to original content.

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Type | Source | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY | Public | wrangler.jsonc vars | Turnstile widget site key |
| TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY | Secret | wrangler secret put | Secret key for token validation |
| COOKIE_SECRET | Secret | wrangler secret put | HMAC-SHA256 key for cookie signing (openssl rand -base64 48) |
| CONTACT_EMAIL | Secret | wrangler secret put | Contact email (protected) |
| CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN | CI | GitHub Secrets | Cloudflare API token for deployment |
| CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID | CI | GitHub Secrets | Cloudflare Account ID for deployment |

## Deployment

Automatic via GitHub Actions on push to master. The workflow:
1. Checkout
2. Setup Node.js 22 with npm cache
3. npm ci
4. npm run build
5. cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3 with apiToken and accountId inputs → wrangler deploy

Common error: "In a non-interactive environment, it's necessary to set a CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" — means the CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN GitHub secret is missing or empty. Create it at Cloudflare with the "Edit Cloudflare Workers" template and add it to GitHub repo Secrets.

## Design System (DESIGN.md)

The design system is documented in DESIGN.md using the Google design.md format. It passes lint with 0 errors and 0 warnings (npx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md).

Key design tokens:
- Colors: primary #0066cc, primary-on-dark #2997ff, ink #1d1d1f, canvas #ffffff, canvas-parchment #f5f5f7, surface-dark #272729
- Typography: Inter font stack, hero 107.2px/600/-0.055em, display 60px/600/-0.045em, lead 24px/300/-0.03em, body 16px/400
- Rounded: pill 9999px (buttons), xl 32px (cards), lg 24px (panels), md 20px (skill cards)
- Spacing: section 96px, container 1280px, base unit 8px
- Single shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.22) 3px 5px 30px 0 — imagery only, never on cards/buttons/text

Design principles:
- Single Action Blue accent for all interactive elements
- Alternating light/dark sections — color change IS the divider
- Weight 300 is rare (leads only), 600 for headlines, 500 for buttons/nav
- Negative letter-spacing on all display sizes
- GSAP animations: reveal, magnetic buttons, 3D tilt — all gated behind prefers-reduced-motion

## Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA)

- Skip link to #main
- Focus visible: 2px solid primary-focus, 4px offset
- Touch targets: min 44px (min-h-11)
- Native <dialog> with focus trap, Escape to close, backdrop click to close
- Carousel keyboard nav (ArrowLeft/ArrowRight)
- ARIA: aria-label on nav, buttons, dialog; role=status + aria-live=polite on email copy status
- Decorative images: alt="" (empty); informative images: descriptive alt
- prefers-reduced-motion: disables all animations, shows .reveal immediately
- Contrast: Action Blue on white 5.97:1 (AA), ink on white 16.6:1 (AAA), body-muted on parchment 4.68:1 (AA)

## SEO

- Meta: title, description, keywords, robots (index,follow,max-image-preview:large), canonical
- Open Graph: og:type=website, og:locale=es_CO, og:image 1200x630 PNG
- Twitter Card: summary_large_image
- JSON-LD: Person (name, jobTitle, sameAs LinkedIn/GitHub, knowsAbout) + WebSite (url, inLanguage es-CO)
- robots.txt: allow all, sitemap link
- Worker pages (challenge, email): noindex

## Performance

- Static-first: no framework runtime JS
- Images: AVIF + WebP + PNG via <picture>, lazy loading (eager on hero + first slide)
- Video: WebM optimized + MP4 compatible, autoplay muted loop, IntersectionObserver at 0.35
- Fonts: Inter via system stack fallback (no @font-face, no FOUT/FOIT)
- CSS: Tailwind 4 auto-purge, design tokens via CSS custom properties
- Caching: edge-cached static assets, no-store on protected routes

## i18n (ES/EN)

No i18n library. Uses data attributes:
- data-es / data-en: text content in Spanish/English
- data-i18n-aria-es / data-i18n-aria-en: aria-label in Spanish/English
- Toggle: #languageToggle button, setText(lang) updates all elements
- Persisted in localStorage under "lang"
- <html lang> updated dynamically

## Project Structure

```
agreeable-altitude/
├── .github/workflows/deploy.yml    # CI/CD
├── public/
│   ├── tech/                       # Technology SVG icons
│   ├── education/                  # Institution logos
│   ├── projects/                   # Project screenshots and videos
│   ├── docs/cv-jose-carlos-gomez.pdf  # CV (protected)
│   ├── favicon.svg                 # Favicon source
│   ├── og-image.png                # Open Graph image
│   ├── robots.txt                  # Crawler directives
│   ├── sitemap.xml                 # Sitemap
│   ├── site.webmanifest            # PWA manifest
│   ├── llms.txt                    # AI index
│   └── llms-full.txt               # This file
├── scripts/
│   ├── generate-icons.cjs          # PWA icon generator
│   └── generate-ico.cjs            # favicon.ico generator
├── src/
│   ├── pages/index.astro           # Main page (6 sections)
│   ├── styles/global.css           # Design tokens + CSS components
│   └── worker.ts                   # Cloudflare Worker (Turnstile + protected routes)
├── astro.config.mjs                # Astro config
├── wrangler.jsonc                  # Cloudflare Workers config
├── DESIGN.md                       # Design system (Google design.md format)
├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript strict
└── package.json
```
